executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for a chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: Node.js Express server with authentication via RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN, providing POST /syntax and /lint endpoints for checking JavaScript code using ESLint and syntax validation.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot web application with mobile-responsive design, custom CSS for light/dark themes, and integration with highlight.js for code syntax highlighting.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file storing predefined keywords and one-sentence summaries for other files in the project, used as an index or metadata store.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration file defining edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, and a GitHub token endpoint, with CORS headers allowing access from cc-copy.netlify.app.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Acts as a proxy to the DeepSeek chat completions API, handling both streaming and non-streaming responses with proper error handling.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Proxies requests to a Railway-hosted service by extracting a path suffix and forwarding with an auth token.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Proxies search queries to the Firecrawl API, returning formatted results with snippet and domain extraction.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Exposes a GitHub Personal Access Token stored in Netlify environment via a simple GET endpoint with CORS.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Proxies web search requests to the LangSearch API, forwarding the request body and response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter API, handles streaming responses, validates API key, and returns appropriate responses.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html during Netlify deploy-preview builds to bypass the login gate and show the main content.

preferences.json.summary: Configuration file for a self-improving bot with settings for clarification prompts, planning rules, execution code style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: Main chat component that manages messages, settings, run state, token budget, and integrates with workspace and provider stores for an interactive chat interface.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: Component that renders a list of chat messages with adaptive styling for mobile, theming, compact mode, and differentiation between user and agent messages.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: React component for the chat header, featuring a sidebar toggle button, repository name display, and responsive styling based on theme and window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Input bar component with a styled text input and send button, supporting compact mode, theme colors, and mobile responsive layout with Enter key handling.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageContent.summary: Renders chat message content by parsing code fences and thinking blocks, applying theme-aware and compact styling with adjustable font size.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Displays a scrollable list of chat messages with distinct user and agent styles, including role labels and auto-scroll via a ref.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: Shows run state with phase icon and color, expandable log area, auto-scroll to latest log, and support for compact and dark/light themes.

src/components/SimpleChat/Sidebar.js.summary: React component rendering a themed sidebar panel with responsive width, inputs, and buttons based on settings.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: React component that displays a scrollable list of tasks with color-coded status and titles, adapting font size for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: React component that renders a fixed-position toast message with border color based on error or success type.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Core class that manages an agentic self-improvement process, integrating GitHub, LLM, task queue, and orchestration modules with configurable callbacks.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Accumulates file summaries, notes, and plan information to build a compact context string for LLM prompts during an agentic run.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: The chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 5, extracting 5-10 keywords per file and a short summary, with robust JSON extraction and retry on timeout, then commits the resulting keywords.json.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: The agenticExecutor executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, delegating prompt building, edit application, quality checks, and commit verification to focused modules, with a maximum of 8 turns.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: commitVerifier re-reads a committed file to verify its SHA matches the expected SHA, logging warnings on mismatch or failure.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: promptBuilder constructs the LLM prompt for the agentic executor using ContextBuilder for smart file selection and injecting conversation memory, including rules for Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: qualityGate runs lint and syntax checks before commit, retrying up to 2 times with LLM-generated fixes using SEARCH/REPLACE blocks.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE or legacy update_editor blocks to build a fileMap for commit, handling errors and retries.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files for a goal by scoring files based on keyword matches from an index or fallback filename scan.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Verifies if changes on a feature branch achieve the original goal by comparing the diff using an LLM.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching using Levenshtein distance for command recognition.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest is available by loading from repo or building from source file tree.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: Incrementally updates manifest.json after code changes by re-parsing exports/imports of modified files with static regex and recomputing importedBy for the whole manifest.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: Replaces window.prompt() with a proper state-machine that saves questions to ConversationMemory, returns a Promise resolved when the user sends answers, and shows questions in chat.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: Runs the execute-and-review loop for self-improvement tasks, handling up to 3 cycles of execution and review with persistent memory save/load.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: Simple pause flag manager that provides requestPause, checkPause, and resetPause functions.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: Executes everything after review passes including manifest update, regression detection, goal verification, pull request creation, and smoke test.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: runSetup orchestrates initial setup before planning: it initializes conversation memory, enriches the goal with error context if detected, loads user preferences, and creates a feature branch for the run.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: parallelExec runs pending tasks concurrently up to a configurable max concurrency, skipping tasks that touch files already locked by another running task to prevent conflicts.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: persistentMemory provides serialization and deserialization of working memory objects to/from JSON files in the .self-improve directory, scoped by runId to avoid overwrites across concurrent runs.

src/core/planner.js.summary: planner uses an LLM to generate a milestone plan with tasks based on discovered file content or file tree, returning a JSON structure with analysis and up to 4 tasks.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores the codebase by iteratively reading files and deciding next actions via LLM, building a plan with file summaries and supporting hierarchical sub-goals.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Creates a coordinated multi-agent plan by grouping candidate files by top-level directory, running parallel exploration agents per directory, and merging summaries via a coordinator agent into a plan with files or subGoals.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals using an LLM decision, creating a hierarchical plan with tasks, and initializing a task queue.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Selects the appropriate planner based on discovery cache size, then applies hierarchical planning on top.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub with a title derived from the goal and returns its URL.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Detects regressions by finding files that import changed files and checking whether symbols they expect still exist using LLM analysis.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Compares original files with committed versions to enforce goal alignment and demands line-level issue reporting using GitHubService and LLMProvider.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a task queue with statuses (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions to initialize, query, and update task states.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Provides a topological sort function to order tasks based on their dependency relationships.

src/main.js.summary: Entry point that initializes React app with SimpleChat component and creates a SelfImprover instance using various services from stores and services modules.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves preferences.json from the repository, merging with defaults for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Manages structured context across runs per repo+branch using localStorage, storing goal, phase, decisions, lastAction, openQuestions, failedAttempts, and lastUpdated.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses error stack traces and converts them into structured file references with line numbers for planner injection.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides a client for making calls to the Netlify edge proxy for linting and syntax checking, with fail-open behavior on network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: Fetches file trees, loads file contents, and commits multiple files to GitHub repositories using the REST API.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Central service for calling language models through Netlify proxies with timeout, retries, and support for thinking modes.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Class SmokeTest provides static methods to poll a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly (id="root" present, no SyntaxError) within a timeout, building preview URLs from PR number and site name.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for AI provider settings (provider, selectedModel, thinkingMode, reasoningEffort) with default values and setter actions.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for workspace state (currentRepo, currentBranch, githubToken, rememberKeys) and respective setter functions.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Exports processAgentSkills function that parses AI replies to extract structured actions (update_editor blocks, SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, read_file requests) and returns a modified reply with placeholders.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Class ContextBuilder with static methods to select target and related files from a manifest respecting a token budget and build a context string with full target file contents and interface-only related file snippets.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph for JavaScript files by parsing ES module imports/exports and creating a manifest mapping each file's exports, resolved imports, and reverse dependencies.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Tests code execution in a sandboxed iframe by pre-loading modules and running a health check on a SelfImprover instance with a configurable timeout.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using a matching cascade of exact and whitespace-flexible matches, returning detailed error diagnostics for failures.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JavaScript and CSS comments and blank lines from code to reduce prompt size.
